overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character walking through an industrial human facility. The character moves through metallic corridors, descends stairs into a large communal workshop area with other NPCs, and approaches an exit leading to the outdoor jungle environment. The setting features industrial metal architecture with orange accents, hydroponic gardens, and scattered workbenches.

events.description: passes through yellow door frame into interior corridor
begins descending metal staircase to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial corridor, passing hydroponic shelves and descending stairs

notable_agents.action: human character sitting on bench near the stairs

entered.detail: large industrial door frame painted yellow-orange
riveted metal panel walls with industrial texture
multi-tiered shelving with green plants under grow lights
thick orange and gray pipes running along walls
metal grate stairs with yellow safety stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor with yellow door frames and metal walls. The Na'vi character walks forward past hydroponic shelving units on the left, then descends a metal staircase toward a lower level. A single NPC sits on a bench near the stairs. The environment features industrial pipes and metal grating floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: large communal workshop with canvas canopy ceiling

events.description: exits staircase into large open communal area with high ceiling
passing blue glowing lanterns creating cool light accents

agents.ego_description: walking through large communal space, observing NPCs and surroundings

notable_agents.action: child character with glowing blue backpack standing in the open area

entered.detail: large fabric canopy stretched across ceiling with wooden supports
floating or mounted blue luminescent light sources
thick timber posts supporting the canopy structure
thick cables and hoses snaking across the floor
wooden tables with various tools and materials

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a spacious communal workshop with a high canvas canopy ceiling supported by wooden beams. The area is populated with several NPCs including a child with a glowing blue backpack. Blue luminescent lanterns provide accent lighting. The character walks past crafting tables and coiled cables on the floor, exploring the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop area with tool storage and work tables

events.description: slight turn to avoid workbench on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through workshop area, passing NPCs working at benches

notable_agents.action: character sitting at workbench working on equipment

entered.detail: tall metal racks holding boxes and equipment
red and gray metal cabinets with tools
tall brown metal drawers for storage
heavy industrial doors painted orange marking the exit

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the workshop area, passing metal storage racks and tool lockers. An NPC sits at a workbench on the right, working on equipment. The space features wire mesh fencing sections and scattered work tables. The blue glowing lights from the previous area fade into the background as the character approaches orange exit doors in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor leading to airlock doors

events.description: passes through orange double doors into narrow corridor
final door opens revealing outdoor jungle environment

agents.ego_description: approaching exit, passing through airlock-style doors toward the outside

entered.detail: metal panel walls of the exit corridor
storage lockers lining the corridor walls
large metal exit door with window showing greenery outside
lush green trees and plants visible through the opening door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the facility exit, passing green recycling bins and warning signs. The character goes through orange double doors into a narrow corridor with metal lockers, then approaches a final airlock-style door. At the end of the segment, the door opens to reveal a misty outdoor jungle environment with lush vegetation, marking the transition from indoor industrial space to outdoor natural setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial facility that gradually opens into a lush, misty jungle. It begins in a narrow corridor with yellow door frames and hydroponic shelving, descending a metal staircase past a lone NPC toward a lower level. As the character emerges from the stairs, the environment expands into a spacious communal workshop under a high canvas canopy, where blue luminescent lanterns light the way past crafting tables and NPCs. The scene then shifts through a series of tool lockers and wire mesh fencing, with the blue glow fading as the camera tracks toward distant orange exit doors. Finally, the character passes through a series of airlocks and metal lockers before the final door opens to reveal the vibrant, foggy vegetation of the outdoor wilderness.
